anchor: Hey, what's our current stock for item X?
positives: [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Stores real-time stock quantities per item per warehouse. Needed to retrieve current inventory levels.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Identifies the specific item. Required to filter for item X.
[FIELD] actual_qty | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Current available quantity in stock. This is the answer to 'current stock'.
[FIELD] warehouse | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Location where stock is stored. Needed to aggregate across warehouses or filter by location.

anchor: Which items are running low?
positives: [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Tracks current stock levels per item. Needed to identify items below reorder threshold.
[FIELD] actual_qty | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Current stock quantity. Used to compare against reorder level.
[FIELD] reorder_level | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Minimum stock threshold before reordering. Items with actual_qty below this are 'running low'.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Item identifier. Needed to return which items are low stock.

anchor: What's the total value of our inventory?
positives: [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Contains current stock quantities. Needed for inventory valuation calculation.
[FIELD] actual_qty | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Quantity in stock. Used in multiplication with valuation rate.
[FIELD] valuation_rate | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Cost per unit of item. Multiplied by actual_qty to get total value.
[TABLE] tabItem | desc: Master data for items. May be joined for additional item details.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Links stock records to item master. Used for aggregation.

anchor: Which warehouse has the most stock?
positives: [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Stores stock quantities by warehouse. Needed to aggregate stock per location.
[FIELD] warehouse | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Warehouse identifier. Used for grouping stock by location.
[FIELD] actual_qty | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Stock quantity. Summed per warehouse to find total stock.
[TABLE] tabWarehouse | desc: Warehouse master data. Joined to get warehouse names and details.
[FIELD] name | [TABLE] tabWarehouse | desc: Warehouse name. Used in join with tabBin.warehouse for display.

anchor: Who's our top supplier for the past quarter?
positives: [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | desc: Records purchase transactions. Needed to calculate supplier purchase volumes.
[FIELD] supplier | [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | desc: Supplier identifier. Used for grouping purchases by supplier.
[FIELD] grand_total | [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | desc: Total purchase order value. Summed per supplier to find top supplier.
[FIELD] transaction_date | [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | desc: Date of purchase order. Filtered to last quarter's date range.
[TABLE] tabSupplier | desc: Supplier master data. Joined to get supplier names and details.
[FIELD] name | [TABLE] tabSupplier | desc: Supplier name. Used in join for display purposes.

anchor: how much stock we got left for item XYZ?
positives: [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Stores real-time stock per item per warehouse. Needed to check current inventory.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Item identifier. Filtered to match 'XYZ' in the question.
[FIELD] actual_qty | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Current available quantity. This is the answer to 'how much stock we got left'.

anchor: which items are running low in warehouse A?

anchor: what's the total value of our stock?

anchor: how much stock for item ABC?
positives: [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Contains current available stock quantity for each item in each warehouse. Used to answer real-time inventory balance and on-hand stock questions.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Identifies the specific product being queried. Filtered to match the item mentioned in the question such as 'ABC'.
[FIELD] actual_qty | [TABLE] tabBin | desc: Represents the live quantity available in stock. This field directly answers how much stock is currently available.

anchor: who's our best supplier lately?
positives: [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | desc: Records purchase transactions made to suppliers. Used to calculate how much has been ordered or spent per supplier.
[FIELD] supplier | [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | desc: Links each purchase order to a specific supplier. Grouped to compute total purchases per supplier.
[FIELD] grand_total | [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | desc: Stores the monetary value of each purchase order. Summed to determine total spend and rank suppliers by volume.
[FIELD] transaction_date | [TABLE] tabPurchase Order | desc: Represents the date of the purchase order. Filtered to match the current quarter time range.
[TABLE] tabSupplier | desc: Master data table containing supplier details such as name and contact information. Joined to display readable supplier names.
[FIELD] name | [TABLE] tabSupplier | desc: Primary supplier identifier used for display and ranking output.

anchor: items sold this month?
positives: [TABLE] tabSales Invoice | desc: Stores sales transaction headers including invoice date and customer information. Used to filter sales by time period such as this month.
[FIELD] posting_date | [TABLE] tabSales Invoice | desc: Represents the invoice date. Filtered to restrict results to the current month.
[TABLE] tabSales Invoice Item | desc: Contains individual line items for each sales invoice. Used to retrieve the actual products sold.
[FIELD] parent | [TABLE] tabSales Invoice Item | desc: Links each item row to its parent sales invoice. Required to apply date filtering from the invoice header.
[FIELD] item_code | [TABLE] tabSales Invoice Item | desc: Identifies the product sold. Used to list or aggregate items sold in the selected period.
[FIELD] qty | [TABLE] tabSales Invoice Item | desc: Represents the quantity sold per item. Summed to calculate total units sold.
